news.t: Trade Energy Stocks With 3 Times Leverage With MicroSectors(TM) Energy ETNs

holdings.infoBox: WTID is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 15.35%, Exxon Mobil at 14.45%, ConocoPhillips at 11.65%, Occidental Petroleum at 9.41%, and Valero Energy at 8.94%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Energy 3X Inverse Leveraged ETNs (WTID) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive MicroSectors Energy index. The fund is an exchange-traded note that tracks 300% inverse of the daily price movements of an index of US-listed energy and oil companies, selected and weighted by liquidity. WTID was launched on Feb 17, 2023 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.title: Trade Energy Stocks With 3 Times Leverage With MicroSectors(TM) Energy ETNs
data.text: MIAMI, FL / ACCESSWIRE / April 17, 2023 / Equity securities in the energy sector outperformed the broad market in 2022. The Energy Select Sector Index and the MicroSectors Energy Index were up around ...
